title: rubus × defectivus
intro: Rubus × defectivus, also known as the black raspberry or black thimbleberry, is a hybrid plant that belongs to the rose family and is a cross between the black raspberry (Rubus occidentalis) and the thimbleberry (Rubus parviflorus). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Rubus × defectivus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection against cell damage. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
